items.title: Trump administration will end immigration enforcement surge in Minnesota: Homan
items.description: Border czar Tom Homan said President Donald Trump has agreed with his proposal to conclude a federal immigration enforcement surge in Minnesota.

items.title: Fed chair drama: Tillis pours cold water on off-ramp for Powell criminal probe
items.description: Sen. Thom Tillis says handing off the DOJ's criminal probe of Fed Chair Jerome Powell to the Senate Banking Committee wouldn't satisfy his concerns.
